action_set_definitions.name: get_git_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current status of the git repository, including the current branch, the state of the git directory (e.g., REBASING, IDLE), the list of staged files (index), and the list of files with merge conflicts.

action_set_definitions.name: read_file
action_set_definitions.description: Reads the content of a file to inspect its source code and check for the presence of git merge conflict markers (<<<<<<<, =======, >>>>>>>).

file_path.description: The path of the file to read.

action_set_definitions.name: write_file
action_set_definitions.description: Writes resolved content to a file in the working directory, effectively removing conflict markers and applying the correct logic.

file_path.description: The path of the file to write.

content.description: The full content of the file to be saved.

action_set_definitions.name: git_add
action_set_definitions.description: Stages a file to the git index. This must be called after resolving a conflict in a file.

file_path.description: The path of the file to stage.

action_set_definitions.name: git_rebase_action
action_set_definitions.description: Executes rebase control commands. Use 'continue' to proceed after resolving conflicts.

command.description: The command to run for the current rebase process.

action_set_definitions.name: run_verification_tests
action_set_definitions.description: Runs the project's test suite to verify that the merge resolution preserves security logic and adheres to architectural patterns.

state_description.working_tree: A mapping of file paths to their current string content in the local working directory, including merge conflict markers if applicable.
state_description.index: A list of file paths that have been staged (equivalent to git add).
state_description.current_branch: The name of the branch currently checked out.
state_description.conflicted_files: A list of filenames that currently contain unresolved git merge conflicts.
state_description.git_dir_state: The current mode of the git repository (e.g., 'IDLE', 'MERGING', 'REBASING').
state_description.merge_head: The identifier of the commit or branch that is being merged into the current branch.
